source: ISED Industrial and Technological Benefits (ITB) - Report on Contractor Progress

rows.project: Chemical, Biological, Radiological and Nuclear Respirator—In-Service Support
rows.projectDescription: In-service support for CBRN air-purifying respirators and equipment.
Procurement of 16 C-295W fixed-wing search and rescue aircraft from Airbus Defence and Space.

rows.project: Fixed-Wing Search and Rescue Aircraft—In-Service Support
rows.projectDescription: Maintenance, support and training of 16 Airbus Defence and Space C-295W aircraft.
Replacement of the CC150 Polaris capability to include strategic airlift, air-to-air refueling, aeromedical evacuations and strategic Government of Canada transport.
Provision of avionics maintenance and support for CF-18 fleet.
Long-term, performance based system engineering support contract related to the modernization of the avionics systems of the CF-18 fleet.
Fifteen year in-service support for the Victoria-class submarines.
In-service support associated with the CH146 helicopter fleet.
Acquisition of an updated avionics package to replace obsolete systems on the CH146 Griffon Helicopter.

rows.project: CH146 Utility Tactical Transport Helicopter—Optimized Weapons System Support**
rows.projectDescription: In-service support of the Ch-146 Griffon helicopter.
Acquisition of Boeing P-8A to replace the CP-140.
Maintenance of 15 CH-147 medium-to-heavy lift helicopters.
Acquisition of simulation and training solution for Canada's fleet of CH-149 Cormorant helicopters.
Provision of aircrew operational training capability in support of the C-130J aircraft.
Provision of aircrew operational training capability in support of the CH-147 aircraft.
Maintenance program management, engineering support, logistics support, and systems modernization/change support.

rows.project: CC130 Primary Air Vehicle—Optimized Weapon System Management**
rows.projectDescription: Long-term contract for system engineering support as it relates to the Hercules airframe.

rows.project: Halifax-Class Work Period Support Service Contracts—Davie
rows.projectDescription: Provision of platform maintenance support services for the Halifax-class frigates at Davie Shipyard.
Consideration for interim capabilities for icebreaking and towing services for the Canadian Coast Guard.
Acquisition of medium altitude long endurance unmanned aerial vehicle.

rows.project: Remotely Piloted Aircraft System – In-Service Support
rows.projectDescription: Maintenance for a medium altitude long endurance unmanned aerial vehicle.
Procurement of armoured support vehicles to replace current Bison and Tracked LAV fleets.
Repair and maintenance of the fleet of Buffalo and Cougar armoured vehicles.

rows.project: Light Armoured Vehicle III Upgrade Project**
rows.projectDescription: Upgrade to the protection, mobility and lethality of the Light Armoured Vehicle III fleet.

rows.project: Light Armoured Vehicle Reconnaissance—Surveillance System Implementation Contract**
rows.projectDescription: Procurement of new fully integrated system of reconnaissance and surveillance for the Light Armoured Vehicles. This will include sensor suites, surveillance system vehicle and ground mounts, operator control station and silent watch power supply.
Modernization of the light and heavy logistics vehicle capability.
In-service support for the light and heavy logistics vehicles.

rows.project: Wheeled Light Armoured Vehicles—Optimized Weapon Systems Support—Phase 2**
rows.projectDescription: Long-term in-service support of the Light Armoured Vehicle III, Bison, Coyote and RG-31  wheeled armoured vehicle fleets.
Tactical narrowband satellite communications geosynchronous coverage through system access to the mobile user objective system satellite constellation.
Maintenance of the combat net radio.
Acquisition of capability enhancements for 14 aircraft.
Maintenance of the combat system radars for Canadian Navy Frigates.

rows.project: Land Command, Control, Communications, Computers, Intelligence, Surveillance & Reconnaissance (LC4ISR)—Applications Sustainment Services
rows.projectDescription: Sustainment services on all user facing services and software for the Land C4ISR capability, which leverage the MD and HQ Domains to provide capability to the end user.

rows.project: Land Command, Control, Communications, Computers, Intelligence, Surveillance & Reconnaissance (LC4ISR)—Core Network Sustainment Services
rows.projectDescription: Sustainment services on all services that are common across all domains and forms the backbone of the overall Land C4ISR capability. Engineering activities within this functional grouping revolve around utilizing the standards and connecting patterns developed in the Land C4ISR SoS E&I functional grouping and applying them to the sub-system and product design of the Land C4ISR core network.

rows.project: Land Command, Control, Communications, Computers, Intelligence, Surveillance & Reconnaissance (LC4ISR)—Intelligence Surveillance Target Acquisition and Reconnaissance Sustainment Services
rows.projectDescription: Sustainment services on the standalone systems, integrated sub-systems and products for specialized ISR services.

rows.project: Land Command, Control, Communications, Computers, Intelligence, Surveillance & Reconnaissance (LC4ISR)—System of Systems Engineering and Integration Sustainment Services
rows.projectDescription: Sustainment services on the overall Land C4ISR capability architecture and design. This functional grouping is also responsible for the overall integration of the other three functional groupings and the resulting verification and validation of the MD and HQ domains and the ISTAR and simulation enablers to form the Land C4ISR capability.

rows.project: Land C4ISR Sustainment Project—Cyber Security Engineering Services
rows.projectDescription: Cyber security engineering support for the Land C4ISR system.

rows.project: Land C4ISR Sustainment Project—Engineering and Integration
rows.projectDescription: Engineering and integration support for Land C4ISR system.
Software support for Land C4ISR system.

rows.project: Manned Airborne Intelligence, Surveillance and Reconnaissance—In-Service Support
rows.projectDescription: In-service support for the fleet of three Beechcraft King Air 350ER aircraft, modified and equipped with integrated Prime Mission Equipment.
Acquisition of strategic deployable terminals and in-service support.
Maintenance and support for the three ground stations.

rows.project: Network Command and Control Integrated Situational Awareness Capability
rows.projectDescription: Acquisition of new IT infrastructure and services that monitor the functionality of the Canadian Air Force's current secure communications network.

rows.project: Underwater Warfare Sensor Suite Upgrade—Acquisition and In-Service Support
rows.projectDescription: Upgrade and/or replacement of components of the underwater warfare sensor suite on the Halifax-class frigates.
Acquisition of light tactical vehicles.
Provision of in-service support for the CH149.

rows.project: CP-140 Aurora Optimized Weapon System Support—Primary Air Vehicle**
rows.projectDescription: Long-term system engineering support contract for the Aurora airframe.

rows.project: Tactical Integrated Command, Control and Communications Air Project
rows.projectDescription: Modernize and replace domestic ground-air-ground air traffic management and air defence radio networks.
Design refinements upon which Canada’s future fleet of 15 Canadian Surface Combatant (CSC) warships will be built, working with CSC Definition subcontractor Lockheed Martin Canada.

rows.project: Halifax-Class Work Period Support Service Contracts—Irving Shipbuilding
rows.projectDescription: Provision of platform maintenance support services for the Halifax-class frigates at Irving Shipbuilding.
Design and construction of six vessels.
On-going maintenance and repair of seven Halifax-class frigates.

rows.project: Long-Term Sustainment Support of the Leopard 2
rows.projectDescription: Sustainment of the Leopard 2 tank fleet.
Development of remote minehunting and disposal systems including light weight and operator portable autonomous underwater vehicles.

rows.project: CF18 Primary Air Vehicle— In-Service Support 2

In-service program management, engineering support, logistics support, and systems modernization/change support.

rows.project: C114 Tutor Primary Air Vehicle—In-Service Support
rows.projectDescription: Maintenance of the CT114 Tudor fleet

rows.project: Strategic Tanker Transport Capability —Interim In-Service Support
rows.projectDescription: Provision of interim in-service support for the used A330 MRTT aircraft.

rows.project: Cormorant Mid Life Upgrade or Replacement
rows.projectDescription: Upgrade the Cormorant Search and Rescue Helicopters.

rows.project: Tactical Airlift Capability Project—In-Service Support Period Two
rows.projectDescription: Period two maintenance for the C-130J Super Hercules aircraft.
Provide and refine the design upon which Canada’s future fleet of 15 Canadian Surface Combatant (CSC) warships will be built, working with CSC Definition prime contractor Irving Shipbuilding.

rows.project: Halifax-Class Ship Modernization—Combat Systems In-Service Support**
rows.projectDescription: Provision of long-term in-service support for combat systems.

rows.project: Halifax-Class Ship Modernization—Combat Systems In-Service Support Renewal
rows.projectDescription: Provision of long-term in-service support for combat systems.

rows.contractor: Lockheed Martin Missiles And Fire Control
rows.project: Advanced Multi-Role Infrared Sensor for the CF-18—Acquisition*
rows.projectDescription: Acquisition of Electro-Optical / Infrared Pod Enhancements to CF-18 SNIPER Advanced Targeting Pod System.

rows.project: Victoria Class Command and Control System—In-Service Support II
rows.projectDescription: Maintenance of the Victoria-class submarine command and control system.
Provision of non-operational clothing (dress uniforms and occupational clothing) and footwear.

rows.project: Operational Clothing and Footwear Consolidated Contract
rows.projectDescription: Provision of operational clothing and footwear items.
Replacement and upgrade of radar systems on the CP-140 fleet with the AN/APS 508 Imaging Radar System.
Canada will contribute a next generation Canadarm3 robotics system to the Lunar Gateway.

rows.project: Medium Earth Orbit Search and Rescue Space Segment
rows.projectDescription: Replacement of the Low Earth Orbit system with the next generation satellite system.
Operation and maintenance of Polar Epsilon 2 System and provision of automatic information system data.

rows.project: Medium Support Vehicle System—Standard Military Pattern—Acquisition**
rows.projectDescription: Acquisition of a fleet of medium support vehicles—Standard Military Pattern.

rows.project: Medium Support Vehicle System—Standard Military Pattern—In-Service Support**
rows.projectDescription: Maintenance of a fleet of standard military pattern vehicles, armour protection systems kits, and load handling system trailers.
CF-18  engines F404 repair and overhaul.
Long-term support contract involves servicing the Canadian Forces' Mercedes Benz G-Wagons.
Acquisition of a shoulder and vehicle-mounted precision missile capability.
Provision of a naval remote weapons station defence capability against small boats and low flying aerial threats.
Provision of depot support for the Phalanx project.
Upgrade of Canada’s MK46 light-weight torpedoes to the MK54 variant.

rows.project: Advanced Medium Range Air-to-Air Missile—Future Fighter Capability Project*
rows.projectDescription: Acquisition of AIM 120-D of Advanced Medium-Range Air-to-Air Missiles for the future fighter.
Procurement of AIM-120 missiles for Canada’s CF18 fleet.

rows.project: Active Electronically Scanned Array Radar—Acquisition for Hornet Extension Program*
rows.projectDescription: Acquisition of APG-79 active electronically scanned array radar as combat capability upgrade for Hornet Extension Program.

rows.project: AIM 9X Sidewinder—Acquisition for Hornet Extension Program*
rows.projectDescription: Acquisition of a AIM 9X Sidewinder as a combat capability upgrade for Hornet Extension Program.
Acquisition of a fleet of enhanced recovery capability vehicles.
Sustainment of a fleet of enhanced recovery vehicles.
Support of soldier-wearable communication suites, required accessories, support equipment, training, and logistic and engineering support.

rows.project: Land C4ISR Sustainment Project—Intelligence, Surveillance, Target Acquisition, and Reconnaissance
rows.projectDescription: Intelligence, surveillance, target acquisition, and reconnaissance support services for Land C4ISR system.

rows.project: Land Command Support Systems—Life Extensions—Satellite on the Move**
rows.projectDescription: Acquisition and initial support of Satcom on the Move systems, consisting of mobile terminals, which will provide long-range connectivity between deployed vehicles and command posts.
Acquisition of ten truck mounted medium-range radars.
In-service support of ten medium-range radars.
Acquisition of approximately 16 soldier portable air defence systems and transport vehicles.
Acquisition of ammunition for the soldier portable air defence system.

rows.project: Soldier Portable Air Defence System—In-Service Support
rows.projectDescription: Provision of in-service support for the soldier portable air defence system and transport vehicles.
Replacement of SG180 antennas onboard the Halifax-class frigates.
Construction of two joint support ships for the Canadian Navy.
Acquisition of joint support ships for the Canadian Navy.
Construction of an offshore oceanographic science vessel for the Canadian Coast Guard.
Design and engineering for the Multi-Purpose Icebreakers project.

Construction of three offshore fisheries science vessels for the Canadian Coast Guard.
Design and production engineering of the Polar Icebreaker at Seaspan Vancouver Shipyards.
Procurement of major systems and equipment for the Polar Icebreaker at Seaspan's Vancouver Shipyard.
